problem id: 0290f51a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(5)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  01011010 -> 00101011
  10100100 -> 01010111
  10110001 -> 10110111
  00011001 -> 10011001
  11101011 -> 01100111
  11100001 -> 10100111
  10000001 -> 10111111
  01001101 -> 00001110
  11101111 -> 11100111

query: 11010001
predicted answer: 10101111
